name: Mathewrean Otieno Magundho
tagline: Cybersecurity & IT Operations Attachment Candidate | SOC/CTF Practitioner
summary: BSc Computer Security & Digital Forensics student at JOOUST with redirected energy toward SOC operations, CTF competition prep, and digital forensics research. I pair SIIS congressional leadership, JOOUST ISACA technical writing, and CTFZone mentorship to make cybersecurity more hands-on and community driven.
about: I balance academic rigor, student governance, and technical writing with a steady stream of TryHackMe, CTFZone, and Cyber Chief Circle challenges. My mission is to coach peers through SOC playbooks and public-sector awareness sessions while taking on blue-team tasks, network forensics, and secure DevSecOps practices.
